instructions: Follow the rules in .editorconfig and CONTRIBUTING.md.
Prioritize the use of Blazor and modern components.
Use C# 12+ and recommended patterns for Blazor.
Build the multitenant Feature Flags system following these critical rules:
Do not generate all code at once. Wait for approval at each stage before continuing.
Apply SOLID principles, appropriate design patterns, and strong typing.
At the end of each stage, provide a summary of what was built and how to verify it works.
Modular approach: the system must handle Products -> Environments -> Sections -> Keys.
Enums must have explicit numeric values (e.g., Boolean = 0, LargeString = 1).
Prefer Minimal APIs over Controllers. Endpoints go in ApiService/Endpoints/ as static extension methods (MapXxxEndpoints).
Request models go in ApiService/Models/. Do not expose DTOs with Access Keys in write operations.
Access Keys are auto-generated on entity creation using AccessKeyGenerator (IProvider project). Rotation: Primary -> Secondary, new Primary generated.
DI is wired via AddFeatureFlagData() from EB.FeatureFlag.Data project. Config keys: FeatureFlag_RepositoryType, FeatureFlag_CacheType, etc.
Provider layer (IFeatureFlagProvider) handles business logic, cache management, and key generation/rotation.
Phases 1-2 are complete. Next: Phase 3 (Section/FeatureKey CRUD + type validators).
